forbidden_changes: do not add global survival bonus without progress gating
do not only scale all coefficients
do not treat partial_progress as success_like
required_changes: Restructure terminal_reward component to ensure it only rewards safe landing (both legs contact, low speed, small angle) and penalizes crashes, not early_failure
Make safe landing conditions more stringent to avoid rewarding non-landing terminations
Preserve progress-conditioned gating and near-stage bonus components (approach_progress, proximity_bonus, near_stability, leg_bonus)
Consider recalibrating approach_progress to better discriminate partial_progress from early_failure if feasible

intended_fix: make a conservative reward with clear components
use analyzer context to gate known failure patterns
expected_effect: Provide a simple, interpretable baseline candidate that reacts to known failures.
risk: May be too weak for difficult tasks.
